title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd!
